heading: General Counsel; appointment
label: 2214 General Counsel; appointment
notes: CodificationSection is based on that part of section 301 of act , relating to the General Counsel of the Department of Agriculture. children.label: a
children.text: The President shall appoint on and after , by and with the advice and consent of the Senate, a General Counsel of the Department of Agriculture.July 31, 1956

children.label: b
children.text: The existing office of General Counsel of the Department of Agriculture shall be abolished effective upon the appointment and qualification of the General Counsel provided for by subsection (a) or , whichever is earlier.April 1, 1957
